name: split-error-non-string-subject
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :SplitSubjectNotString :message "split expects String at position 1, got Number" :operand "split" :position 1 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "split" :args [{ :qlang/kind :StringLit :value "," :text "\",\"" :location { :start { :offset 11 :line 1 :column 12 } :end { :offset 14 :line 1 :column 15 } } }] :effectful false :text "split(\",\")" :location { :start { :offset 5 :line 1 :column 6 } :end { :offset 15 :line 1 :column 16 } } } :input 42 } :trail [] }

name: split-error-vec-subject
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :SplitSubjectNotString :message "split expects String at position 1, got Vec" :operand "split" :position 1 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Vec" :actualValue [1 2] :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "split" :args [{ :qlang/kind :StringLit :value "," :text "\",\"" :location { :start { :offset 14 :line 1 :column 15 } :end { :offset 17 :line 1 :column 18 } } }] :effectful false :text "split(\",\")" :location { :start { :offset 8 :line 1 :column 9 } :end { :offset 18 :line 1 :column 19 } } } :input [1 2] } :trail [] }

name: split-error-null-subject
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :SplitSubjectNotString :message "split expects String at position 1, got Null" :operand "split" :position 1 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Null" :actualValue null :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "split" :args [{ :qlang/kind :StringLit :value "," :text "\",\"" :location { :start { :offset 13 :line 1 :column 14 } :end { :offset 16 :line 1 :column 17 } } }] :effectful false :text "split(\",\")" :location { :start { :offset 7 :line 1 :column 8 } :end { :offset 17 :line 1 :column 18 } } } :input null } :trail [] }

name: split-error-non-string-separator
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :SplitSeparatorNotString :message "split expects String at position 2, got Number" :operand "split" :position 2 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "split" :args [{ :qlang/kind :NumberLit :value 42 :text "42" :location { :start { :offset 14 :line 1 :column 15 } :end { :offset 16 :line 1 :column 17 } } }] :effectful false :text "split(42)" :location { :start { :offset 8 :line 1 :column 9 } :end { :offset 17 :line 1 :column 18 } } } :input "abc" } :trail [] }

name: split-error-keyword-separator
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :SplitSeparatorNotString :message "split expects String at position 2, got Keyword" :operand "split" :position 2 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Keyword" :actualValue :foo :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "split" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Keyword :name "foo" :text ":foo" :location { :start { :offset 14 :line 1 :column 15 } :end { :offset 18 :line 1 :column 19 } } }] :effectful false :text "split(:foo)" :location { :start { :offset 8 :line 1 :column 9 } :end { :offset 19 :line 1 :column 20 } } } :input "abc" } :trail [] }

name: split-error-vec-separator
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :SplitSeparatorNotString :message "split expects String at position 2, got Vec" :operand "split" :position 2 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Vec" :actualValue [] :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "split" :args [{ :qlang/kind :VecLit :elements [] :text "[]" :location { :start { :offset 14 :line 1 :column 15 } :end { :offset 16 :line 1 :column 17 } } }] :effectful false :text "split([])" :location { :start { :offset 8 :line 1 :column 9 } :end { :offset 17 :line 1 :column 18 } } } :input "abc" } :trail [] }
